summary: WIP, closed-unmerged attempt to decompile part of sysdolphin initialize.s. The PR moved HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, and the empty HSD_DVDInit from assembly into src/sysdolphin/initialize.c, renamed the remaining assembly file to initialize_asm.s, added sysdolphin sources/includes to the Makefile and linker script, and introduced minimal GX/video/init headers needed to type the code. There were no PR body notes or review comments in the slice, so rationale and review outcome are weakly evidenced.
what_changed: Renamed asm/initialize.s to asm/initialize_asm.s and removed the assembly bodies for HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, and HSD_DVDInit from the remaining assembly file.
Added src/sysdolphin/initialize.c implementing HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, and HSD_DVDInit in C.

HSD_InitComponent was expressed as a high-level initialization sequence: HSD_OSInit, stack-local HSD_VIStatus setup from rmode and clear color globals, HSD_VIInit using three FrameBuffer entries, then HSD_GXInit, HSD_DVDInit, HSD_IDSetup, VIWaitForRetrace, HSD_ObjInit, func_803881E4, and setting init_done TRUE.
HSD_GXSetFifoObj was expressed as assignments to memReport.gxfifo-like storage and DefaultFifoObj-like storage using existing lbl_ globals.
Renamed func_80375304 to HSD_OSInit in the leftover assembly, indicating symbol identification without yet decompiling that function.
Added minimal include/dolphin/gx/gxtypes.h with GXFifoObj, GXRenderModeObj, GXColor, GXColorS10, GX boolean/enable constants, GX attribute constants, gamma constants, and GX_MAX_Z24.
Added src/sysdolphin/video.h defining HSD_VIStatus with GXRenderModeObj, black/vf/gamma, clear color/z, and update flags.
Added src/sysdolphin/initialize.h with prototypes for HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, and HSD_DVDInit.

Updated include/functions.h comments/prototypes for identified functions including VIWaitForRetrace, HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, HSD_DVDInit, HSD_AllocateXFB, HSD_GXInit, HSD_OSInit, HSD_ObjInit, HSD_VIInit, HSD_IDSetup, and func_803881E4.
Updated include/global.h to include dolphin/gx/gxtypes.h and dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h.
Updated Makefile so C_FILES includes src/sysdolphin/*.c and INCLUDES includes src/sysdolphin/.
Updated ldscript.lcf to link initialize_asm.o after initialize.o so decompiled C and remaining assembly coexist.
smart_moves: Split the file incrementally: decompiled only the identified functions while preserving the rest of initialize.s as initialize_asm.s.
Kept link order explicit by adding both initialize.o and initialize_asm.o to ldscript.lcf, a common tactic when gradually replacing assembly with C.
Introduced enough GX and video type information to make HSD_InitComponent readable instead of leaving all stack stores as raw words.

Used real SDK-style names for several functions and types where identifiable, such as HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, HSD_DVDInit, HSD_OSInit, GXFifoObj, GXRenderModeObj, GXColor, and HSD_VIStatus.
Modeled the long stack initialization sequence as a structured HSD_VIStatus local, making the intent of the copied render mode and update flags clear.
Preserved unknown global labels while annotating likely meanings in comments, avoiding unsupported full renames in the code shown.
decomp_lessons: For early decompilation work, partial C replacement can be done by renaming the residual assembly file and explicitly linking both C and assembly objects.
Stack-store-heavy initialization functions often become much clearer once the target struct is reconstructed; here the HSD_VIStatus layout explains the local stack region.
Before decompiling callers of graphics/video initialization, define SDK-like GXRenderModeObj and GXColor structures and relevant GX constants so calls and field assignments are typed.
Function identification can progress independently from C decompilation: the PR renamed func_80375304 to HSD_OSInit while leaving its assembly body intact.
When exact global names are not proven, retaining lbl_ names with comments such as FrameBuffer, memReport, rmode, and init_done is safer than inventing symbol names.
Build-system and linker-script updates are part of the decomp task whenever source directories are introduced or assembly is split.
naming_conventions: Sysdolphin functions use HSD_ prefixes, e.g. HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, HSD_DVDInit, HSD_OSInit, HSD_GXInit, HSD_ObjInit, HSD_VIInit, HSD_IDSetup.
Dolphin GX SDK-like types use GX-prefixed CamelCase names, e.g. GXFifoObj, GXRenderModeObj, GXColor, GXColorS10.
GX constants use GX_ uppercase macro names, e.g. GX_TRUE, GX_ENABLE, GX_GM_1_0, GX_MAX_Z24, GX_VA_POS.
Local reconstructed HSD video state was named HSD_VIStatus and placed in src/sysdolphin/video.h.
Unknown data symbols remained as lbl_ addresses with explanatory comments rather than being fully renamed.
Residual assembly was named initialize_asm.s after extracting initialize.c, matching the pattern of pairing decompiled C with leftover assembly.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed exact assembly for HSD_InitComponent, HSD_GXSetFifoObj, and HSD_DVDInit and replaced it with C intended to cover the same text range.
Represented repeated loads from lbl_804D5E04 into stack offsets as assignment of an entire GXRenderModeObj into vi_status.rmode.
Represented color load from lbl_804DE590 as a GXColor local assigned into vi_status.clear_clr.
Used GX_TRUE, GX_ENABLE, GX_GM_1_0, and GX_MAX_Z24 constants to mirror immediate values used in the assembly setup.
Mapped a call to former func_80375304 at the start of HSD_InitComponent to HSD_OSInit.
Left remaining assembly functions in initialize_asm.o and renamed the symbol func_80375304 to HSD_OSInit without changing its body.
Adjusted ldscript.lcf object ordering to preserve placement after splitting one assembly object into C plus residual assembly.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, reviews, or PR body text were present in the provided slice.
The PR was closed without merge, so the proposed decompilation should be treated as WIP evidence rather than accepted project state.

Potential caution from the diff itself: include/dolphin/gx/gxtypes.h has mismatched include guard spellings (_gxtypes_h_ vs _gxtype_h_) and no final newline, but there is no review comment confirming this was discussed.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs or commits that successfully decompiled sysdolphin initialize.c or replaced initialize_asm.s.
Check whether the GXRenderModeObj and HSD_VIStatus layouts from this WIP were corrected or reused later.
Search for review or follow-up discussion about the gxtypes.h include guard mismatch.
Compare final names for lbl_804C0948, lbl_804C0954, lbl_804D5E04, lbl_804D5E0C, lbl_804D76C4, lbl_804D76CC, and lbl_804DE590.
Verify whether HSD_DVDInit is intentionally empty in the final decompilation.
